rationale: A sentence is defined as a wff with no free variables, so the free-variable notion def:fv is load-bearing and missing; def:wff-pred (present) is the substrate. Exact dual of def:open-formula-quantifiers (0018), which is a wff with at least one free variable -- both must carry def:fv.
notes: Consistent with the def:fv additions at 0018 and the wff additions at 0017/0021.
